title: Extendable Curtain Poles 59-120 cm, Tension Rods for Curtains Adjustable Shower Curtain Poles No Drilling Spring Loaded Curtain Rod Shower Rail for Bathroom Window Door Wardrobe, White
features: 【Reinforced Support】 Our extendable curtain pole features a reinforced design with a 50% increase in wall thickness, providing unmatched support. It easily withstands 5 KG of pressure without bending, ensuring a carefree user experience
【No Drilling Installation】The shower tension rod can be installed without drilling or any tools, just simply assemble the rod according to its size and rotate the telescopic rod to fix it to the wall

【Rust-proof and Waterproof】The white tension rod is made of durable high-carbon steel, which is wear-resistant and corrosion-resistant. High temperature color fixation process provides excellent waterproofing and prevents rust

【Apply for Various Surface】The rubber anti-slip heads ensure secure and versatile placement on various surfaces including both smooth and rough surface like wallpaper, glass, tile wall, wooden frame, Etc

【Multipurpose】Shower curtain pole can extend from 59 cm (2 sections) to 120 cm (3 sections), you can add rod to meet different scenarios. Used as shower curtain rod, curtain rod, closet rod, door curtain rod, cabinet rod, tension rod, laundry rod, and bathroom rod

【Sleek Design】The spring loaded curtain rod has a smooth and attractive surface with a streamlined design. Our curtain pole is not only practical but also aligns with modern aesthetics. Whether it's for transforming a room for children or friends, it is an ideal choice for enhancing the beauty of the space
